steps.title: Identify what the passage is doing
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'To compare ancient artworks with modern ones': The passage focuses on a newly found thermopolium in Pompeii and its food remains, decorations, and ceramic jars. No comparison of ancient versus modern artworks appears. ✗
  • Choice B — 'To discuss the political system of Italy': Politics is never mentioned. The passage is about an archaeological site and what it reveals about daily life. ✗
  • Choice C — 'To present a recent archaeological discovery': The passage opens with recently discovered and organizes itself entirely around reporting the find: what was found, what researchers learned, and a specific example (the ceramic jar). ✓
  • Choice D — 'To describe a region's climate': Climate is never addressed. The passage describes an excavation and its findings. ✗

steps.title: Confirm the match
steps.content: The passage's sole purpose is presenting a new archaeological find at Pompeii — the thermopolium with its food remains and artworks. That matches choice C — C is correct.
